name: ChillsHallow: The Medieval Wonderland
description: A medieval town ready for exploration as snow falls across it's land.ChillsHallow is led by a ruthless king: Majesty Abel, who has been known to keep all his riches to himself and command his army of knights and steeds to keep the townsfolk in check. Many citizens live in the cold town of ChillsHallow, one of which is named Peasant Ourri.
creator: Dr.McGaryPhd
